sizing_rule.note: Optimal f maximized by minimizing dispersion (variance) in returns. Geometric mean G increases exponentially as dispersion decreases, approaching limit G=A when dispersion=0. Reduce position size or adjust risk proportionally to lower trade-to-trade variance.

source_rule_text: Traders using fixed fractional position sizing should maximize the geometric mean (G) by reducing dispersion, where lower dispersion yields exponentially greater benefits up to a theoretical limit where dispersion equals zero.
